description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof and a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls. The front features a prominent entryway with a small porch, flanked by manicured shrubs, flower beds, and a double garage. The property is enclosed by a dark fence and includes a driveway, walkways, and landscaped gardens with bushes and trees. The rear of the house has expansive windows and a large, open lawn, suggesting ample natural light and a focus on indoor-outdoor living. The side views reveal additional landscaping, a side yard, and the continuation of the multi-level roof structure. The overall design is spacious, elegant, and well-integrated into a suburban neighborhood context.
description: A large, modern suburban house with a multi-gabled roof, brick and light walls, landscaped gardens, and expansive windows. The property is enclosed by a dark fence and features a double garage and manicured entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, landscaped front yard, and flower beds.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side yard, additional landscaping, and the continuation of the roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a spacious lawn, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Right side view with more windows, a side garden, and a clear view of the fence and greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and grouped panes
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a small porch, steps, decorative shrubs, and a double front door
